title: Tensura-BYG
description: This is a simple, lightweight compatibility patch that fixes a common world-generation crash between the Tensura: Reincarnated mod and Oh The Biomes You'll Go (BYG)
body:
This is a full compatibility patch that allows the "Tensura: Reincarnated" and "Oh The Biomes You'll Go" (BYG) mods to work together seamlessly without crashes or lost content.
 
The Problem:
Without this patch, using Tensura and BYG together results in a critical Feature order cycle error during world generation. This happens because both mods try to add their unique features (like trees) to the same biome spaces, creating an infinite dependency loop that crashes the game.

 
The Solution & Integration

 

This patch doesn't just disable the problematic tensura:sakura_forest biome to prevent the crash. Instead, it integrates its key content into the equivalent biome from BYG, creating a full and logical compatibility experience.

Now, in BYG's cherry_blossom_forest biome, you will find:

    🌸 Sakura Trees from the Tensura mod, generating naturally.

    🐝 Army Wasps from the Tensura mod, which now spawn in this biome to restore its intended fauna.
